title: CrazyVillagers
description: Get ready for pure chaos! Made by Empirecraft Studios - CrazyVillagers adds a bunch of weird, hilarious, and unexpected villagers into your Minecraft world. From fat villagers to deadly mech villagers — this mod flips village life upside down!
body:
**Get ready for pure chaos! Made by Empirecraft Studios - CrazyVillagers adds a bunch of weird, hilarious, and unexpected villagers into your Minecraft world. From fat villagers to deadly mech villagers — this mod flips village life upside down!**

**WORKING ON NEW UPDATE!!**


## MOBS ADDED:
**1. Fat Villager**
These chunky villagers don’t spawn naturally. To create one, feed a normal villager 32 Cheese Breads.
Now how to get cheese bread: you may find cheese in random chest in an village, and here is the recipe of cheese bread:

![bread recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee52887d3c691d50aaa7bc2c954608cdbfe4148a.png)


**2. Newborn Baby Villager**
Tiny and adorable, you’ll find these babies inside Adoption Centers — randomly generated structures in your world. Take the baby from the crib, place it on the ground, and feed it a Milk Bottle to help it grow. Once grown, the baby becomes your loyal bodyguard!
Here is a recipe for milk bottle:

![milk recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33b7dcaf4846eb605cb0d21a1eeedfca033116b7.png)



**3. Pooping Villager and Villager Girl**
These villagers spawn naturally in villages.
_For Pooping Villager:
Walk near them and they’ll... well… poop and die. They drop Poop, which you can throw at other villagers to turn them into Dirty Villagers!_

 

**4. Mecha Villager Boss**
To spawn this boss you need mecha villager spawn item, which you can randomly find in chests in village, if you throw this emblem on ground it will spawn the new boss, i.e. mecha villager boss.
